title: Squirrel Removal in Ossining, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Ossining, Westchester. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Ossining homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Ossining, NY, where these persistent rodents invade attics, crawl spaces, and chimneys in both historic homes and modern residences. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Ossining and surrounding Westchester communities, using humane trapping methods and exclusion techniques to protect your property. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by the area's mature tree canopy and diverse housing stock.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Ossining residents for years with proven squirrel removal expertise, offering same-day emergency services and guaranteed results. Our licensed professionals use humane, effective methods and provide complete attic restoration, ensuring squirrels don't return to your Westchester County home.
localContext: Ossining's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to the Hudson River create ideal squirrel habitat, with many properties near Teatown Lake Reservation and historic downtown experiencing seasonal infestations. The village's mix of Victorian-era homes, modern developments, and properties overlooking the Old Croton Aqueduct often feature the attic access points and architectural features that squirrels exploit for nesting.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Ossining, NY?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Ossining typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This price includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and necessary repairs. We provide free estimates for all Ossining properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Ossining attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed electrical wires or wood, droppings in the attic, and squirrels seen entering or exiting your roof. Ossining homeowners often notice increased activity during fall and spring when squirrels seek shelter or prepare nests.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Ossining?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We safely capture and relocate squirrels, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry. Our approach prioritizes animal welfare while effectively solving your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Ossining home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Ossining residents. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Emergency services are available for urgent situations involving property damage or squirrels in living spaces.
